title: Business Administration
description: A broad major covering leadership, organizational behavior, strategy, operations, finance, and management for business roles.

title: Accounting
description: Focuses on financial reporting, auditing, taxation, budgeting, and the systems organizations use to track money.

title: Finance
description: Covers investments, corporate finance, financial markets, risk management, and capital allocation decisions.

title: Marketing
description: Studies consumer behavior, branding, digital promotion, market research, and campaign strategy for products and services.

title: Economics
description: Examines how individuals, firms, and governments make choices under scarcity using data, models, and policy analysis.

title: Supply Chain Management
description: Prepares students to manage logistics, procurement, inventory, transportation, and operational efficiency.

title: Entrepreneurship
description: Centers on startup creation, business model design, venture planning, innovation, and launching new ventures.
